underlying_goal: Build a deduplication and pruning pipeline for a MusicXML corpus that identifies duplicate/arranged versions of pieces and keeps only original-instrumentation representatives
friction_detail: Multiple rounds of fixing instrument normalization issues (Unicode characters, Japanese/Norwegian/Chinese instrument names, orchestral detection logic).
brief_summary: User wanted to deduplicate a music corpus by identifying equivalent pieces and keeping original-instrumentation versions; Claude built a multi-step pipeline using MIDI comparison, Wikidata, and Wikipedia categories, iteratively refining instrument normalization, and was packaging it into the Makefile when the session ended.
